zh.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon於1208年出生在英國。她於大約1243年與Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon于1208年出生在英国。她于大约1243年与Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury在英国英格兰德比夏爾諾波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰德比夏爾諾波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

variants.name: Emily
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

variants.name: Emma
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

variants.name: Emmeline
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon was born in 1208, in England. She married Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury about 1243, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon est née en 1208, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury environ 1243, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon wurde 1208 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1243 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon è nata il nel 1208 nel England. Lei sposato Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury circa 1243, nel Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendonは1208年にイギリスで生まれた。約1243年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーでSir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon(은)는 1208년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에서 Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon nasceu em 1208, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury aproximadamente 1243, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon родилась в 1208 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury около 1243 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Emeline de grendon nació en 1208, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury aproximadamente 1243, en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
